sections.heading: Librello Publishing
sections.text: Open-access academic publisher The progress of science is only possible by the exchange of ideas and the discussion of theories and paradigms. Our mission is to provide a new environment for the publication of scientific articles. Mission: Advance scientific progress through free exchange of ideas. Offer researchers a sustainable open-access platform. A Message of Gratitude We want to express our deepest gratitude to all authors, editors, reviewers, and readers who have supported Librello over the years. Your trust in our mission—to provide truly free and open access to scientific knowledge—has been the foundation of our work and success. After over a decade of commitment to open science, we have made the difficult decision to pause all new publications indefinitely. This decision was not made lightly, but we believe it is the right step for the future of the organization and the evolving landscape of academic publishing. While our journals will remain accessible for reference and archival purposes, we encourage the community to continue advocating for open-access publishing and the values we have shared. Thank you for being part of this journey. Your contributions have helped shape a more open, transparent, and collaborative scientific world. From March 2024: Challenges in Sustainability and Organic Farming have moved to a new publisher: ACADlore . From January 2024: Journal of Human Security has found a new home at H&N Publishers UK . Former Journals 1. Journal of Human Security (JoHS) Scope: Publishes applied research focused on creating a secure and sustainable future for humanity. 2. Challenges in Sustainability (CiS) Scope: Focuses on environmental/resource science, sustainability governance, pathway and transition studies, and education for sustainability. 3. Organic Farming (OF) Scope: Focuses on on advances and innovations in organic agriculture and food production to provide scholars and other groups with relevant and highly topical research in the field. 4. Politics and Governance Scope: Offers open-access research across political science and governance disciplines. 5. Media and Communication Scope: Covers international media and communication research. Currently published by Cogitatio Press. 6. Social Inclusion Scope: A quarterly peer-reviewed journal covering topics on inclusion, diversity, equity, and integration. Contact Contact Details: librello.publishing@gmail.com

paragraphs.text: The progress of science is only possible by the exchange of ideas and the discussion of theories and paradigms. Our mission is to provide a new environment for the publication of scientific articles.
Mission: Advance scientific progress through free exchange of ideas. Offer researchers a sustainable open-access platform.

We want to express our deepest gratitude to all authors, editors, reviewers, and readers who have supported Librello over the years. Your trust in our mission—to provide truly free and open access to scientific knowledge—has been the foundation of our work and success.

After over a decade of commitment to open science, we have made the difficult decision to pause all new publications indefinitely. This decision was not made lightly, but we believe it is the right step for the future of the organization and the evolving landscape of academic publishing.
While our journals will remain accessible for reference and archival purposes, we encourage the community to continue advocating for open-access publishing and the values we have shared.
Thank you for being part of this journey. Your contributions have helped shape a more open, transparent, and collaborative scientific world.
